{{Quote|I have an idea that could potentially enhance the lifting capacity of the B1 labor droid by up to 25%. If you are able to find a source for the required material, which I need to create the new alloy, I would be more than willing to reward you generously.|A prospective innovator, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Build a Better Labor Droid}}</ref>}}
[[AccuTronics/Legends|AccuTronics]] made a notable entry into the fifth-degree [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]] market with their '''B1 worker droid.''' While the [[CLL-8 binary load lifter]]s were commonly employed in freight operations due to their substantial size, the B-1 worker droid served as a smaller counterpart to these massive machines.

==Characteristics==
Its programming was similar to its larger brethren, which equated to a simplistic, literal mindset which was nonetheless appropriate to the drudgery of heavy manual labor, which required little more than great strength. B1s would take orders from anyone. Its cargo claws were designed with suction pads for added grip, and its reverse articulated legs were aided by a third retracting leg which was used for added stability during lifting of bulky loads.

==History==
[[File:B1_worker_droid.png|thumb|left|200px|A B1 in use as an Imperial defense droid]]
During the period just prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[AccuTronics/Legends|AccuTronics]] fielded a [[Nuna-ball/Legends|nuna-ball]] team composed of B1s. This team was defeated by a [[Serv-O-Droid, Inc.|Serv-O-Droid]] team featuring [[RIC-series general labor droid/Legends|RIC-series droids]], which were quicker and more agile than the strong but lumbering cargo droids.

These droids were used at [[Radell Mining Corporation]] headquarters. The heavily armed Imperial defense droids used on-board the original [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] were of the same design.

==Behind the scenes==
The cost is listed as 9,800 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] (new) and 6,400 credits (used) in [[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] and ''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]'', but the ''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]'' states a price of 800 credits.
